goal: 使用 service-agent + heartbeat + smoke-tester 体系完成完整 E2E 冒烟测试

coverage_checklist.build_pass: assert: bun run build 通过
coverage_checklist.vite_started: assert: service-agent 启动 Vite 并返回 PID
coverage_checklist.heartbeat_ready: assert: heartbeat 验证 localhost:5173 就绪
coverage_checklist.smoke_test_pass: assert: smoke-tester 执行 playwright test 通过
coverage_checklist.process_cleaned: assert: service-agent 按 PID 精确杀 Vite 进程
